positive: A minimalist, elegant silhouette of a graceful leaping fox in motion, surrounded by abstract, stylized floral elements (peonies, lilies). The style is a blend of Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print and modern linocut etching. Composition should be centered and vertically oriented, with the fox dominating the negative space. Use limited, contrasting colors: deep indigo blue, burnt orange, and stark white. Strong, clean line work, high contrast, perfect symmetry, suitable for repeating textile pattern or apparel print. Flat, matte texture.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, dirty, low resolution, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor lines, low detail, photographic, realistic, gradient, 3D render
